name: Knowledge Bubbles
subtitle: Portable knowledge
thesis: Knowledge Bubbles attach source, confidence, and contradiction to every claim. A fact becomes portable instead of a detached sentence.
description: Knowledge Bubbles preserve a claim together with its source, confidence, contradictions, and consent rules. That lets knowledge move between systems without losing the context that made it trustworthy.
before: A fact is a detached sentence.
after: Knowledge carries context, provenance, confidence, and disagreement.

inv.human: Your notes could carry their own sources and doubts.
inv.researcher: Provenance as a first-class data property.
